scope_boundary: Bounded GitHub Pages CI-service attestation for one public publication workflow run. The tracked result records that GitHub Actions reported the Publish Quarto site workflow as completed successfully for one main-branch commit, including the build and deploy jobs and required build steps. It is not independent external human review, not deployed attestation behavior, not open-world receipt faithfulness, not verifier-correctness evidence, not reader release approval, and not an upward support-state transition.
transition_reason: The GitHub Pages CI attestation result artifact-github-pages-ci-attestation-2026-07-04 is useful because it moves the Artifact Graphs record-reality lane beyond local-only replay: an externally hosted CI service reports that the repository publication workflow passed for a specific commit, including source validation, Lean build, HTML render, live Human view validation, browser smoke testing, artifact upload, and deploy. The evidence remains service-status evidence for one workflow run, so it blocks promotion for deployed attestation, open-world receipt faithfulness, verifier correctness, reader release approval, external human review, or chapter-core support.
